creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
bad script for start firefox - /usr/local/bin/firefox:
pkg_info | grep firefox | head -1
firefox-2.0.0.2,1   Web browser based on the browser portion of Mozilla

in file /usr/local/bin/firefox line 117 and 118:
moz_libdir="/tmp//usr/ports/www/firefox/work/fake/lib/firefox"
MRE_HOME="/tmp//usr/ports/www/firefox/work/fake/lib/mre/mre-2.0.0.2"

but in /etc/make.conf i have:
head -1 /etc/make.conf
WRKDIRPREFIX="/tmp/"
